name: Go! Go! Cory Carson
overview: Beep, beep -- go, go! Buckle up for fun and adventure with adorable kid car Cory Carson as he explores the winding roads of Bumperton Hills.

episodes.name: Cory's First Day
episodes.overview: Cory's got big plans for his first day at Motorssori School. First on the agenda? Making friends. But it all feels a bit overwhelming.

episodes.name: Chrissy's Best Friend
episodes.overview: Cory's little sister has a new friend: a shiny red balloon named Loony. But for big brother Cory, keeping Loony safe is a full-time job.

episodes.name: Garbage Day
episodes.overview: Cory's thrilled when his favorite trash truck makes him a "Junior Garbage Apprentice" for the day. He's making the rounds -- and learning a lot!

episodes.name: Firehouse
episodes.overview: A tour of the firehouse led by Freddie's mom sounds exciting until a real-life emergency -- and Cory's behavior -- puts everyone at risk.

episodes.name: Oil Spill
episodes.overview: Mama and Papa are going on a date, so Cory and Chrissy have a babysitter. But Cory's convinced he's a big kid who doesn't really need one.

episodes.name: Sleepover
episodes.overview: Cory can't wait to spend the night at Kimmy and Timmy's house. But everything’s different when he gets there, and it doesn't feel like home.

episodes.name: Speed Limits
episodes.overview: When fun-loving Cory takes a turn as class safety monitor, he gets rid of all the rules -- only to realize that they're there for a reason.

episodes.name: Copy Car
episodes.overview: Little sister Chrissy wants to copy everything Cory does — and it's getting annoying! But sometimes copying someone is the best way to learn.

episodes.name: Happy Anniversary
episodes.overview: It's an afternoon full of surprises when Cory and Chrissy pitch in to help a stressed-out Mama make Papa a special anniversary dinner.

episodes.name: Mike's Carcade
episodes.overview: Cory's training so hard to win the upcoming Go! Go! Dance Party contest that he takes all the fun out of it for Freddie, his frustrated dance partner.

episodes.name: Flat Tire
episodes.overview: Cory gets a flat tire while practicing bumper ball with his friends — and the big game's just hours away! Can Dr. Wiperglass get him patched up to play?

episodes.name: Cory's New Bedroom
episodes.overview: To escape a clingy Chrissy, Cory asks his parents for his own room. But when he finally gets one, something doesn't feel quite right.

episodes.name: Grandpa's Treasure
episodes.overview: Special clues are everywhere when Mama and Papa take Cory and Chrissy on a treasure hunt to remember their grandfather on his birthday.

episodes.name: Ice Cream Truck
episodes.overview: A boiling-hot day in Bumperton Hills has everyone feeling overheated. Cue the sweet song of an ice cream truck ... if Cory and his friends can find it.

episodes.name: Cops & Robbers
episodes.overview: When little sister Chrissy steals something from the store while playing a game, Cory tries to be a good big brother by taking the blame himself.

episodes.name: Superhero School
episodes.overview: Cory creates a superpowered lesson plan for Chrissy when she wants to be a hero in their pretend play — and she’s learning to form sentences, too!

episodes.name: Bored Games
episodes.overview: When the Wi-Fi goes wacky while the Carsons are watching a movie, everyone’s imaginations go wild to act out the film and finish the ending.

episodes.name: Show and Tell
episodes.overview: Cory thinks none of his stuff is cool enough to follow up the best show-and-tell of all time. Will he find the perfect thing to bring in for his turn?

episodes.name: Teen Monster Truck
episodes.overview: Cory sneaks away to watch a scary movie with friends, but he regrets it when he starts getting spooked by bedroom shadows and noises in the night.

episodes.name: Karen
episodes.overview: Technically, she’s just a rock. But Karen is also Cory’s best friend. So when she goes missing, Cory is determined to search everywhere for her.

episodes.name: Near All-Nighter
episodes.overview: Midnight is way past bedtime, but Cory and Freddie are trying their best to stay up and catch the New Year’s Eve disco ball drop.

episodes.name: Winifred Wings
episodes.overview: Cory and Chrissy meet a kid plane named Winnie and help their new friend get over her nerves so she can fly high at an air show.

episodes.name: Substitute Teacher
episodes.overview: Cory and his classmates go crazy for ice cream when their substitute teacher, Eileen Ice Cream Truck, gives cones out after every lesson.

episodes.name: Spoiler Alert
episodes.overview: After seeing his hero Nitro Nicky with her super-cool spoiler, Cory wants one for himself. But will his oversized addition actually cramp his style?

episodes.name: Cory Loses a Tooth
episodes.overview: When Cory loses his first tooth, he thinks he’s falling apart and starts giving away all of his toys to Chrissy.

episodes.name: Trashy Romance
episodes.overview: Cory and Freddie do their best to help their garbage truck friend Gary get ready for a fancy dinner date with Sheryl Steamroller.

episodes.name: School Project
episodes.overview: Cory’s mom helps him build a fancy castle for a school project. But Cory’s simpler design might already do the trick!

episodes.name: Moby Fishy Face
episodes.overview: Chrissy brings home a fishy friend who was supposed to stay in the ocean, so Cory tries to hide it from their parents before it gets too big.
